advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the different types of vendor commands mentioned in the Genesys Logic Spec?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the different types of vendor commands, including GenesysLogic Hub Vendor Command, GL Tool String, HUB3 Hub List Note, USB3/USB2 Hub Controller, and GL3590 ISP Class.

questions.question: What are the different hub configuration settings mentioned in the Genesys Logic Spec?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the different hub configuration settings, including GL3523_Tool_Configuration_v0.90_Internal, GL3590 Tool Configuration, GL7000_FW and Flash Configuration Application Note, GL3525 FW and Flash Configuration Application Note, Hub Configuration, and Project string Info.

questions.question: What other specifications are mentioned in the Genesys Logic Spec besides the Genesys Logic and Apple specifications?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists other specifications mentioned, including Command line PowerShell documentation, GL USB3 Hub Software Development Kit_Mac, GL3525_CPU3_CodeSign document, HP ISP Tool, Windows core isolation bug report, HP Display Firmware Update Spec, HP Accessories Firmware Update Spec v0.6, HP Inc.Firmware Security Requirements, HP D&A Firmware Versioning, HP EndUser Tool translation, HP Digutal signature for Hub ISP rule, OCI related data, Genesys to Scalar i2c communcation apn, Genesys to Scalar with RT1711 communcation apn, MTK Scaler ISP Process Flow, MTK Mt9052 ISP Process Flow, RTK Scalar ISP flow, Realtek_ISP_Flow_V3.0_GenerationII, Realtek_communication protocol(TPV), Realtek ISP Flow for digital signature, and Realtek ISP_Sample_Flow_NewDifferBank.
